name: happycodex
description: Codex-native reliability workflow for high-risk changes with one writer, durable contracts, compaction recovery, and fresh review.

interface.shortDescription: Durable contracts for risky Codex changes
interface.longDescription: Execute cross-system changes, public-contract updates, migrations, and other high-risk Codex work with one Root writer, a durable ExecPlan, a Native Plan cursor, evidence-backed recovery, and fresh independent review.
defaultPrompt: Use $happycodex:happycodex for this high-risk cross-system change.
Use $happycodex:happycodex with Goal for this explicitly goal-backed migration.
Use $happycodex:happycodex with Fable 5 max review when available.
